name: PCL-5
title: PTSD Checklist for DSM-5 (PCL-5)
instructions: Below is a list of problems that people sometimes have in response to a very stressful experience.
column_headers: Keeping your worst event in mind, indicate how much you have been bothered by each problem.

questions_score.text: 1. Repeated, disturbing, and unwanted memories of the stressful experience?
2. Repeated, disturbing dreams of the stressful experience?
3. Suddenly feeling or acting as if the stressful experience were actually happening again?
4. Feeling very upset when something reminded you of the stressful experience?
5. Having strong physical reactions when something reminded you of the stressful experience?
6. Avoiding memories, thoughts, or feelings related to the stressful experience?
7. Avoiding external reminders of the stressful experience?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 8. Trouble remembering important parts of the stressful experience?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 9. Having strong negative beliefs about yourself, other people, or the world?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 10. Blaming yourself or someone else for the stressful experience?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 11. Having strong negative feelings such as fear, horror, anger, guilt, or shame?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 12. Loss of interest in activities that you used to enjoy?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 13. Feeling distant or cut off from other people?

questions_score.cluster_name: Negative Alterations in Cognitions and Mood
questions_score.text: 14. Trouble experiencing positive feelings?
15. Irritable behavior, angry outbursts, or acting aggressively?
16. Taking too many risks or doing things that could cause you harm?
17. Being 'superalert' or watchful or on guard?
18. Feeling jumpy or easily startled?
19. Having difficulty concentrating?
20. Trouble falling or staying asleep?

attribution: PCL-5 (18 August 2023) National Center for PTSD
